packageRules.description: Group all GitHub Actions bumps (checkout, setup-helm, kind-action, release-please) into one PR.

Group the CI lint tools into one PR. NOTE: shfmt's per-asset SHA-256 digests in ci.yml are NOT auto-updated by Renovate — refresh all four in the same PR (the checksum step fails closed until you do). kubeconform fetches CHECKSUMS per-version, so it self-verifies. markdownlint-cli2 is an npm package run via npx (no checksum step).

The pinned sumologic/sumologic Helm chart, kept as its own PR. The mock-deploy job re-renders every values file against the bumped version, so a breaking chart change turns that required check red before merge.
Group the runtime CLI pins installed by the direct-download path (kubectl, helm, kind, podman) into one PR. Major bumps still split out by default.

customManagers.description: Track the pinned Helm chart and runtime CLI versions in sumo-otel-local.sh.
Track the shfmt, kubeconform, and markdownlint-cli2 versions pinned in the CI workflow. currentValue accepts an optional 'v' prefix so both github-releases (v3.13.1) and npm (0.23.0) pins match.
